title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques YouTube's AI content landscape for recycling Claude announcements across channels and announces a new content strategy: weekly Wednesday videos and three live-coding streams per week building real systems with Claude Code and other agents. He plans to cover new features only when they enable genuine project work rather than responding to marketing announcements.
